description: During consolidation for month-end close, an accountant needs to reconcile intercompany payables and receivables between two subsidiaries.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the 'Intercompany AP' balance from Subsidiary A for transactions with Subsidiary B.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds Subsidiary A shows a payable of $15,200 to B.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the 'Intercompany AR' balance from Subsidiary B for transactions with Subsidiary A.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds Subsidiary B shows a receivable of $14,800 from A.

nodes.task_description: Identify the transactions causing the discrepancy.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a timing difference: Subsidiary A has recorded an invoice from B that B has not yet recorded as revenue.

nodes.task_description: Propose a consolidating adjustment to ensure the balances eliminate upon consolidation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent drafts the correct elimination entry.
